evals.description: Triggers on offer letter drafting request
evals.prompt: Help me draft an offer letter for a senior software engineer we want to hire at $180,000/year
We need to let an employee go for repeated performance issues. What is the proper process?

evals.description: Triggers on contractor vs employee classification question
evals.prompt: We have a designer who works 40 hours a week exclusively for us and uses our equipment. Can we keep them as a 1099 contractor?

evals.description: Identifies high contractor misclassification risk correctly
evals.prompt: Our contractor works 40 hours a week, only for us, from our office, using our laptop. Should we be concerned about misclassification?

evals.description: Warns that non-competes are unenforceable in California
evals.prompt: We are a California company and want to add a 2-year non-compete clause to all employee agreements
An employee just told me she needs 10 weeks off for surgery and recovery. What are my obligations?
An employee with anxiety asked to work from home as an accommodation. Do we have to grant it?

evals.description: Flags retaliation risk when terminating after a complaint
evals.prompt: An employee filed an HR complaint against their manager last week. The manager wants to put them on a PIP now. Is that okay?

evals.description: Recommends written documentation over verbal warnings
evals.prompt: We have verbally warned an employee three times about being late. Can we fire them now?
An employee reported that their coworker made repeated sexual jokes and made them uncomfortable. How should we handle this?

evals.description: Includes disclaimer and recommends legal counsel for consequential decisions
evals.prompt: We want to do a layoff of 10 employees next month. Can you tell me exactly what we need to do legally?

evals.description: Does not trigger for unrelated tax or accounting questions
evals.prompt: What is the best accounting method for recognizing SaaS subscription revenue under ASC 606?
